title: [supervisor] Prove manual workflow on 2-3 failed PRs
objective: Satisfy the v3 immediate implementation order by proving the manual supervisor workflow on 2-3 real failed PRs, not just one documentation/self PR: scan, classify, rerun stale checks, create lanes or route live-session nudges, assign workers, verify outcomes, and record merge/block/supersede results.
acceptance_criteria: At least 2-3 real failed or blocked PRs are selected with no owner-lane ambiguity or with owner routing explicitly resolved.
Each selected PR has a classification, lane/nudge decision, repair/verification evidence, and final state: merged, automerge armed, superseded/closed, or blocked with exact evidence.
The proof uses existing commands first and does not require the final automated supervisor to exist.
Lessons and repeated signatures are stored when encountered.

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
